calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Katy Independent School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Katy Independent School District is Wednesday, August 13, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Katy Independent School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Katy Independent School District runs Mar 9, 2026–Mar 13, 2026, 5 days.

yearNumbers.label: Short Year
yearNumbers.detail: Katy ISD schedules 172 instructional days — fewer than the 175–180 most Texas districts run — achieved through longer daily instructional minutes.

yearNumbers.label: Good Friday
yearNumbers.detail: Good Friday is a student and staff holiday, giving families a long Easter weekend — Katy ISD is one of the larger Houston-area districts to formally observe this.

events.name: Early Dismissal and End of Fall Semester
Early Dismissal and Last Day of School

calendarNotes: Katy ISD begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 13, 2025. Thanksgiving Break runs November 24–28, Winter Break runs December 22 through January 2, and Spring Break is March 9–13. Students return for the spring semester on January 6, 2026, following a student holiday on January 5. The school year ends with early dismissal on May 21, 2026, while graduating seniors finish on May 15. The calendar includes 172 instructional days and enough instructional minutes to cover two bad-weather days.
